name: Frosty
description: Advanced Magisk/KSU/APatch module to enhance battery saving and stop Google services drain.
readme_summary: Frosty is an advanced Android module designed to significantly enhance battery life by freezing Google Mobile Services (GMS) and implementing system-wide doze optimizations. It offers granular control over GMS categories, app dozing, background restrictions, and screen-off optimizations, all configurable via a WebUI.
key_features: App Doze and Deep Doze for aggressive background restrictions
Screen Off Optimization (disabling connections, RAM cleaner)
Kill Google Tracking (analytics, telemetry, ad tracking)
primary_use_case: To significantly improve Android device battery life by optimizing and restricting background Google services and other power-hungry processes.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl perched on a tree branch, meticulously organizing and silencing a swarm of buzzing digital bees representing Google services. The owl uses glowing, ethereal threads to gently contain the bees, preventing them from draining energy from a large, stylized battery icon below. Subtle UI elements showing 'freeze' and 'optimize' icons are visible on the owl's wings. The background is a dark, serene night sky, emphasizing the 'sleep' or 'doze' state. The overall mood is peaceful and efficient. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing golden accents for the owl and its tools.

name: opentrashmail
description: Open Source standalone trashmail solution that ships its own mail server
readme_summary: Open Trashmail is a self-hosted, open-source solution for managing temporary email addresses. It provides a mail server that can receive emails and make them accessible via a web interface, JSON API, RSS feed, and custom webhooks, without requiring pre-creation of email addresses.
key_features: RSS feed for every email address
Supports Plaintext, STARTTLS, and TLS on connect
Can be used as an email honeypot or for programmatic 2FA solutions
No need to pre-create email addresses
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and temporary email receiving service for various applications, including testing, automation (like 2FA), and privacy-focused sign-ups.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, magical mailbox stands open, receiving a torrent of diverse letters and packages from all directions. From the mailbox, instead of just mail, streams of data, glowing RSS icons, and small JSON code snippets elegantly flow out, being sorted and organized by unseen digital hands. A subtle 'Open Trashmail' logo is etched onto the mailbox. The scene is vibrant and clean, with a focus on the transformation of raw incoming mail into structured digital outputs. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with soft, glowing highlights and a clear, uncluttered composition, emphasizing the effortless conversion of email into accessible data formats.

name: ultra
description: An advanced profiler for .NET Applications on Windows and macOS
readme_summary: Ultra is an advanced profiler for .NET applications on Windows and macOS, providing detailed performance insights through sampling and ETW/EventPipe data. It visualizes performance data using a UI similar to Firefox Profiler, offering features like timeline, flamegraph, and call tree views.
key_features: Sampling profiler (ETW on Windows, EventPipe on macOS ARM64)
Timeline, Flamegraph, Call Tree, Marker Chart visualizations
Precise kernel, native, and managed function call stacks
Requires net8.0+ via dotnet global tool
primary_use_case: Performance profiling and analysis of .NET applications on Windows and macOS.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer meticulously drawing a detailed map of a complex, bustling city. The cartographer uses a magnifying glass and glowing digital tools to highlight intricate pathways, traffic flow, and hidden infrastructure within the city. Small data streams and code snippets float around the map, representing the underlying .NET application. The city itself is a metaphor for the application's performance, with busy streets indicating high activity and quiet alleys representing less-used code paths. The scene is set in a modern, well-lit studio, emphasizing precision and clarity. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, digital aesthetic, featuring a color palette of blues, greens, and subtle oranges to denote activity levels.

name: Automated-AI-Web-Researcher-Ollama
description: A python program that turns an LLM, running on Ollama, into an automated researcher, which will with a single query determine focus areas to investigate, do websearches and scrape content from various relevant websites and do research for you all on its own! And more, not limited to but including saving the findings for you!
readme_summary: This Python repository transforms a locally run LLM via Ollama into an automated web researcher. It takes a single query, breaks it down into researchable focus areas, performs web searches, scrapes content, and compiles findings into a document. The LLM can then summarize the research and answer questions about it.
key_features: Automated research planning with prioritized focus areas
Systematic web searching and content analysis
All research content and source URLs saved into a detailed text document
Rich console output with status indicators
Comprehensive answer synthesis using web-sourced information
Research conversation mode for exploring findings
primary_use_case: To automate the process of online research by using an LLM to identify research topics, gather information from the web, and synthesize findings.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched on a stack of books and glowing with digital energy, is actively sifting through a swirling vortex of interconnected web pages and data streams. The owl's eyes glow with intelligence, and it's meticulously organizing glowing threads of information into a neat, illuminated scroll. Subtle UI elements showing search queries and data points float around the owl. The background is a softly lit, modern library, suggesting knowledge and research. The overall mood is one of diligent, automated discovery. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, focused composition and a color palette of deep blues, golds, and whites, emphasizing intelligence and efficiency.

name: pdf-rag-app
description: A RAG application for chatting with PDF files.
readme_summary: PageSage is a web application that enables users to interact with PDF documents by leveraging Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). It allows users to upload PDFs, which are then vectorized and processed by a language model to answer user queries within the context of the document.
key_features: RAG application for chatting with PDF files
Uses pre-trained models for text generation
Google Gemini API for prompt processing
primary_use_case: Enabling users to have conversational interactions with the content of PDF documents.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian character is shown sitting at a large wooden desk, holding a magnifying glass over an open book (representing a PDF). As the librarian looks through the magnifying glass, streams of glowing, organized data particles flow from the book onto a nearby holographic display, forming clear, concise answers to questions. The holographic display shows a subtle, futuristic UI element with the 'PageSage' logo. The background is a cozy, modern library with soft, ambient lighting. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and a touch of magic in information retrieval.
